Aframp cNGN Platform

Platform Status

Operational

The Aframp cNGN stablecoin infrastructure is fully operational. All systems are running within normal parameters.

About cNGN

cNGN is a Nigerian Naira-backed stablecoin built on the Stellar blockchain. It provides instant, low-cost cross-border payments with full 1:1 NGN reserve backing.

Our multi-custodian treasury allocation engine ensures no single point of failure, with concentration limits enforced across Tier-1 banks and cash equivalents.

API Documentation

Access the full API documentation at api/docs.
